cover_caption: Diffusion Policy's energy landscape — learned energy function visualized as contours where bright regions indicate high probability
source_title: Diffusion Policy: Visuomotor Policy Learning via Action Diffusion

ai_summary.one_liner: Diffusion models applied to robot visuomotor policies — 46.9% average improvement over SOTA across 15 tasks from 4 benchmarks
ai_summary.problem: Behavior cloning struggles with multimodal action distributions, high-dimensional action spaces, and training instability
ai_summary.solution: Represent visuomotor policy as conditional DDPM with receding horizon control, visual conditioning, and time-series diffusion transformer
ai_summary.key_result: Average 46.9% improvement across 15 tasks; ToolHang 87% (BET: 20%), Kitchen 4-stage 99% (BET: 44%)
limitations: CNN over-smooths fast actions; Transformer is hyperparameter-sensitive

figures.caption: Diffusion Policy's gradient field. Visualizing the learned score function ∇log p(a|o), showing the direction toward high-probability regions from each point in action space.
figures.caption_ko: Diffusion Policy의 gradient field. 학습된 score function ∇log p(a|o)의 기울기장을 시각화한 것으로, 행동 공간의 각 점에서 높은 확률 영역을 향한 방향을 나타낸다.

figures.caption: Diffusion Policy's energy landscape. Visualizing contours of the learned energy function where the black curve represents demonstration trajectories and bright regions indicate low energy (high probability).
figures.caption_ko: Diffusion Policy의 에너지 경관(energy landscape). 학습된 에너지 함수의 등고선을 시각화한 것으로, 검은 곡선은 시연 궤적, 밝은 영역이 낮은 에너지(높은 확률)를 나타낸다.
